Subscriber.title: Subscriber
Subscriber.description: A user who has subscribed to the marketing newsletter.

email.description: The email address of the subscriber.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user subscribed.

User.title: User
User.description: A registered user of the platform.

uid.description: The unique identifier for the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

displayName.description: The display name of the user.

photoURL.description: The URL of the user's profile photo.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user account was created.
